close_reason: Updated to use fixed timestamps with :now parameter
description:
## File
`apps/bedrock_job_queue/test/bedrock/job_queue_test.exs`

## Tests to Update (lines 29-41)

### 1. "visible? returns true when vesting_time has passed" (lines 29-33)
```elixir
# Current
past = System.system_time(:millisecond) - 1000
item = Item.new("tenant_1", "test", %{}, vesting_time: past)
assert Item.visible?(item)

# Should be
now = 10_000
item = Item.new("tenant_1", "test", %{}, vesting_time: 9_000)
assert Item.visible?(item, now)
```

### 2. "visible? returns false when vesting_time is in future" (lines 36-40)
```elixir
# Current
future = System.system_time(:millisecond) + 10_000
item = Item.new("tenant_1", "test", %{}, vesting_time: future)
refute Item.visible?(item)

# Should be
now = 10_000
item = Item.new("tenant_1", "test", %{}, vesting_time: 20_000)
refute Item.visible?(item, now)
```

## Principle
Use deterministic timestamps throughout.
title: Update job_queue_test.exs Item tests
